data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: A system design that uses independent, deployable services to enhance scalability and maintainability.

data.title: Scalable Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: Amazon's use of its own AWS products to ensure the website can handle millions of concurrent users.

data.title: High Availability Design
data.description: Designed to provide continuous operations without interruptions.

data.title: Database Sharding
data.description: Splitting data into shards across multiple databases to reduce query load.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: A network to distribute content globally for lower latency.
